chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No.D-1369 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Before; Mr. Justice Arshad Hussain Khan Mr. Justice Irshad Ali Shah. 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of MA-6871/2020. 3. For hearing of main case. 09.02.2021. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional A.G. == The petitioners by way of instant petition, have sought for quashment of F.I.R Crime No.72 OF 2020, u/s: 452, 365-B, 506(ii), 392, 147, 148, 149 P.P.C, registered at P.S. Tando Jan Muhammad District Mirpurkahs. Based upon report of S.H.O P.S. Jan Muhammad, it is stated by learned A.A.G that the said F.I.R has already been recommended by the police to be canceled under ‘C’ Class. None has appeared on behalf of the petitioners. Be that as it may, the purpose of filing instant petition has been served and it is disposed of accordingly. J U D G E J U D G E Muhammad Danish Steno* 2
